trending_videos.title: Resident Evil Veronica - Official Reveal Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Take a look at this reveal trailer for the remake of RE Code Veronica, revealed during the Summer Game Show 2026.

Tune into Summer Game Fest 2026 on June 5th at 2pm PT/5 pm ET!

Hosted by Geoff Keighley and co-host Lucy James check out a 2 hour live look at what's next in video games, with new game announcements, reveals, updates, world premieres, surprise special guests and more.

After Summer Game Fest wraps join GameSpot as we break down the biggest reveals, most surprising moments, what we wished was there and more.

#sgf2026 #sgf #summergamefest #gaming

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

trending_videos.title: SUMMER GAME FEST 2026: Official 4K60FPS Livestream, (Resident Evil Veronica, FINAL FANTASY VII)
trending_videos.description:
Join Geoff Keighley and Lucy James live from Dolby Theatre in Hollywood for a 2 hour live look at what's next in video games, with new game announcements, surprise special guests and more.
Immediately followed by Day of the Devs.

Streaming live in 4K 60FPS at 5p ET / 2p PT / 11p CEST.

Subscribe to Watch more Summer Game fest:  http://bit.ly/tga18sub

Follow SGF on X: http://www.x.com/summergamefest

Follow Summer Game Fest on Instagram:
http://www.instagram.com/summergamefest

Follow Geoff Keighley on X:
http://www.x.com/geoffkeighley

#summergamefest #sgf #worldpremiere

trending_videos.title: FINAL FANTASY VII REVELATION - Reveal Trailer
trending_videos.description:
As the world teeters on the brink of annihilation, the final battle against Sephiroth begins.
A meteor mars the sky, monstrous planetary guardians wreak havoc across the globe, and the fires of war rage. Now, Cloud and his companions must stand against this chaos to not only decide the planet's fate, but bring a legendary conflict to its conclusion.

In the final chapter of the FINAL FANTASY VII remake project, the scale has never been larger and the stakes have never been higher. Take to the skies and explore a boundless world, fight alongside a fully assembled party, master strategic and dynamic combat, and prepare yourself for the climactic finale.

A vast planet awaits. Everything leads here.

Release Date : Spring 2027
Platforms: PlayStation®5 / Nintendo Switch™ 2 / Xbox Series X|S / Windows / Steam / Epic Games Store 

X: https://x.com/FinalFantasyVII
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/FinalFantasyVII
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@FinalFantasyVII
Facebook: https://www.faceboo

trending_videos.title: Guild Wars 3 | Announcement Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Explore Tyria like never before in Guild Wars 3, an action-adventure MMORPG and modern evolution of the genre. Play solo or form a band of adventurers, forging impactful and enduring bonds with fellow players, a formative cast of memorable NPCs, and the nature spirits that call Orr home.
 
Available on PC and PS5.

trending_videos.title: Monster Hunter Wilds: Ascendance - Official Reveal Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Introducing Monster Hunter Wilds: Ascendance, the massive expansion to Monster Hunter Wilds. Soar into a land above, wield new abilities, and hunt legendary monsters in Master Rank! 

Elder Dragons are coming. Prepare yourselves! The next era of Monster Hunter begins in 2027 on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC. 

Official website
https://www.monsterhunter.com/wilds-ascendance/

*Footage represents a game still in development. The main Monster Hunter Wilds game is required to play Monster Hunter Wilds: Ascendance.

trending_videos.title: Street Fighter 6 - Year 4 Character Reveal Trailer feat. Tifa (FINAL FANTASY VII Remake Series)
trending_videos.description:
The Year 4 roster features iconic special guest Tifa from the FINAL FANTASY VII Remake Series, brand new fighters Yasmine and Arjun, and the second protagonist of World Tour, Bosch!

Yasmine - Summer 2026
Arjun - Autumn 2026
Tifa - Early 2027
Bosch - Spring 2027

Yasmine will release on August 3, and we’ll have much more to share on each new character, so stay tuned!

The Year 4 Character and Ultimate passes are now on sale so please check the details from the website. 

https://streetfighter.com/6/

©CAPCOM © SQUARE ENIX 

#StreetFighter6 #SF6 #Capcom #Yasmine #Arjun #Bosch #Tifa #FF7R #FinalFantasy

Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/streetfighter
Discord: https://discord.gg/streetfighter
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/streetfightergame/
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/streetfighter
Twitch: http://www.twitch.tv/capcomfighters

Platinum Games returns with a new Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles game based on the iconic story of The Last Ronin.

Only one of the Turtles remains, and he must now fight to avenge his fallen brothers.

#IGN #gaming #summerofgaming

game_announcements.description: A significant portion of the trending videos are related to game announcements and trailers. This includes popular franchises such as Resident Evil, FINAL FANTASY, and Monster Hunter.
game_announcements.insight: There is a high demand for content related to new game announcements, particularly from established franchises. Leveraging these announcements can drive viewership and engagement.

gaming_events.description: Several videos are tied to major gaming events like the SUMMER GAME FEST 2026.
gaming_events.insight: Gaming events are pivotal moments for content creators to capture audience interest. Covering live events and providing analysis can attract large audiences.

multimedia franchises.description: Franchises like FINAL FANTASY and Resident Evil are featured across multiple videos and contexts, indicating their broad appeal.
multimedia franchises.insight: Content creators can benefit from creating cross-franchise content, exploring themes and narratives that connect different game worlds.

diversified content.description: The trending videos are produced by a wide range of channels, each specializing in different aspects of gaming.
diversified content.insight: There is an opportunity for new creators to enter the space by focusing on niche content within the gaming genre, such as deep dives into lesser-known games or indie titles.

major channels.description: Channels like GameSpot and thegameawards are prominently featured.
major channels.insight: Collaborating with or gaining mentions from major channels can significantly boost a creator's visibility. Building relationships with these channels could be beneficial.

live streaming.description: Live streams of events like SUMMER GAME FEST attract significant attention.
live streaming.insight: Investing in live streaming capabilities and real-time engagement strategies can capitalize on the audience's desire for immediate content during major gaming events.

cross-platform storytelling.description: Games that intersect with other media, such as movies or TV shows (e.g., TMNT), are trending.
cross-platform storytelling.insight: Developing content that explores the crossover between games and other media can tap into a broader audience base interested in multimedia storytelling.

user-generated content.description: Games like Subnautica 2, which allow for user-generated content and gameplay experimentation, are popular.
user-generated content.insight: Encouraging user-generated content and community engagement can enhance a game's longevity and popularity on platforms like YouTube.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
